name: @cap/sandbox-provider-boxlite
description: BoxLite sandbox provider client and adapter for CAP.

scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && node test/boxlite-client.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-security.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-provider.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-provider.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-terminal-transport.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-terminal-transport-coverage.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-conformance.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-coverage.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && c8 --100 --include=dist/**/*.js --reporter=text sh -c "node test/boxlite-client.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-security.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-provider.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-provider.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-terminal-transport.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-terminal-transport-coverage.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-conformance.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-coverage.test.mjs"
